name: Monday Night Women's Book Study
notes: Third Monday is Group Conscience following the meeting. Service opportunities are available. We celebrate milestones at the beginning of the meeting with chips and applause. The format of the meeting is an ongoing read of AA approved literature from “cover to cover”, where attendees each read 1-2 paragraphs followed by an immediate share reflecting on reading. There is an option to pass. The last 15 minutes are reserved for people who did not read, or passed, and would like to share on reading or sobriety related topics. "Double dipping" is allowed at the end. We offered coffee, tea and a candy basket.
